creator: denverh@comcast.net
text:
Actually, this is still a problem.  It recurs when creating or accessing a new notebook.  Here's the related report on github:
https://github.com/zim-desktop-wiki/zim-desktop-wiki/issues/2603

It sounds likely that it's connected to sqlite, but I don't have a good way to try earlier versions right now.

Thanks,

Denver
